assembly_context.name: 4Axis_Robotic_Arm_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 生成一个包含底座、3个中间臂段和1个带夹爪顶臂的4轴机械臂装配体。底座为长方体加圆台接口；臂段由两端方块（60x60x60mm）和中间圆柱组成，通过侧面销孔配合实现竖直转动；底座与第一臂通过中心轴孔配合实现水平转动。所有方块棱边倒角C2。交付SolidWorks零件及装配文件。
design_rules: All dimensions in mm, convert to meters for modeling API.
Chamfer C2 on all cube edges of arm segments.
Clearance fit assumed for pin/hole interfaces (nominal size used for geometry).
Gripper fingers are modeled in half-open state.
assembly_sequence: Insert base_plate and fix to GROUND.
Mate arm_segment_2.bottom_side_face coincident with arm_segment_1.top_pin_face (or appropriate offset).

part.name: Top Arm with Gripper
part.function: Final link with integrated parallel gripper.
part.shape: Bottom part: 60x60x60mm cube with side Φ10 through-hole, connected via Φ40x150mm cylinder to a top mounting block. Top mounting block holds two parallel fingers (40x10x5mm) in half-open state. No top pin. All cube/block edges chamfered C2.
part.material_or_notes: Aluminum body, plastic or metal fingers.

faces.name: bottom_side_face
faces.purpose: Mates with Arm 3 top pin face

axes.name: bottom_hole_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local X, offset in bottom cube

assembly_relation_notes: Bottom hole concentric with Arm 3 pin_axis.
Bottom side face coincident/offset with Arm 3 top_pin_face.
No further assembly constraints above this part.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Model bottom cube with side hole Dia 10.
Model two fingers 40x10x5mm attached to top block, spaced apart (half-open).
Chamfer C2 on all sharp edges of cubes/blocks.
